title: [报告管理] 电子签名(国密SM2/SM3)
notes:
Implemented SM2/SM3 electronic signature system:

1. Mock Data (data.ts):
   - Added DigitalSignatureRecord, Sm2Certificate, SignatureAuditEntry types
   - Added mockSm3Hash(), mockSm2Sign() simulation functions
   - Added computeDocumentHash() for document integrity
   - Added signatureMeanings (编制/审核/批准/复核)
   - Added mockSm2Certificates (5 certs: active/revoked/expired)
   - Added mockDigitalSignatures (6 signature chain records)
   - Added mockSignatureAuditLog (7 audit entries)

2. API Handlers (handlers.ts):
   - POST /api/v1/signatures - Create SM2 signature with SM3 hash
   - GET /api/v1/signatures/:id - Query signature record
   - GET /api/v1/signatures/document/:docId - Document signatures
   - POST /api/v1/signatures/verify - Verify signature (SM3 hash + SM2 + cert)
   - GET /api/v1/signatures/verify/qr/:docId - Public QR verification
   - POST /api/v1/certificates - Import SM2 certificate
   - GET /api/v1/certificates - List certificates
   - GET /api/v1/certificates/:id - Certificate detail
   - POST /api/v1/certificates/:id/revoke - Revoke certificate
   - GET /api/v1/audit/signatures - Signature audit log

3. ReportsPage Enhancements:
   - Enhanced SignatureModal with SM3 hash display, meaning statement, confirmation
   - Signature verification tab in report detail drawer
   - QR code generation for issued reports
   - 'Verify' and 'QR' action buttons for issued reports
   - Integration with SM2/SM3 signature API

4. CertificatePage (new):
   - Certificate list with KPI stats (active/expiring/revoked/expired)
   - Certificate import form
   - Certificate detail modal
   - Certificate revoke functionality

5. Router:
   - Added /certificates route
   - Added sidebar menu item for certificates

title: Pre-existing failure: go test ./... fails on Node.js project (misconfigured test_command)
description:
The refinery test config specifies 'test_command = go test ./...' but the hc_lims project is a Node.js/TypeScript/Vite project with no Go module. 'go test ./...' can never succeed on this project.

This is a pre-existing configuration issue, not caused by any branch. Blocks automated test verification during merge processing.

Suggested fix: Update the rig config to use the appropriate test command:
- 'npm test' (if tests are added)
- 'npx tsc --noEmit' (for type-checking)
- or disable run_tests if no test framework exists
close_reason: Fixed: Changed default test_command in mol-refinery-patrol formula from 'go test ./...' to '' (empty string). Tests now only run when explicitly configured per-rig, preventing 'go test' failures on Node.js projects.
